title: Sub items - not creating action/triggers when assigned as an automation
excerpt: HI, I have used the automations to create a standard list of “certificates”, with which I then assign a date of issue and expiry, I then automate a notification when the date is about to be met, or, the date has been met…

posts.author: M6GRU (Mike McGruther)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI, I have used the automations to create a standard list of “certificates”, with which I then assign a date of issue and expiry, I then automate a notification when the date is about to be met, or, the date has been met, however, the notification and status change don’t work. I can get the dates to work through a deadline mode, giving some warning, but not what I want.

Any help or advice is appreciated.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Mike!

Charlotte here from the monday team!

Would you be able to share a screenshot with us of the automation recipes you have set up for this? This will help us identify what may be going wrong here so we can suggest a workaround or fix for this.

You can also chat with our specialized automations team here.
